description: Credit-Linked Note pricer. Prices a CLN as a risky note whose cash flows are weighted by survival probability derived from a hazard rate term structure calibrated to CDS spreads.

required_fields.name: fixed_coupon_rate
required_fields.description: Annual coupon rate on the CLN (decimal or %, auto-normalised)

required_fields.name: reference_entity
required_fields.description: Name of the reference entity — used to select the CDS curve. Provide this or reference_obligation_isin

required_fields.name: reference_obligation_isin
required_fields.description: ISIN of the reference obligation — alternative to reference_entity

optional_fields.name: recovery_rate
optional_fields.description: Default recovery rate applied in the hazard rate model

optional_fields.name: credit_spread_bp
optional_fields.description: Issuer Z-spread on top of the risk-free rate (basis points)

optional_fields.name: reference_cds_curve_name
optional_fields.description: Explicit CDS curve name to override auto-selection from the curve file
